top_signals.title: AAR slams “hypocrisy” as Trump-backed rail safety measure is included in transportation funding bill
top_signals.summary:
The Railway Safety Act opposed by railroads rode Trump’s backing to be included in surface transportation funding legislation.

The post AAR slams “hypocrisy” as Trump-backed rail safety measure is included in transportation funding bill appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
